# Dmytro Afanasiev — AI Automation Consultant

## About
Dmytro is a solo AI automation consultant based in Calgary, Canada. He builds AI-powered systems for small and medium businesses — specifically lead follow-up automation, AI voice agents, CRM workflows, and client onboarding automation. He has 7 years of software development experience and has been building AI automation systems full-time since 2024.

## Services
- n8n workflow automation (self-hosted and cloud)
- GoHighLevel CRM setup and automation
- VAPI AI voice agent development for lead qualification and booking
- AI appointment setter systems
- Email sequence automation and database reactivation
- AI-powered lead generation and qualification pipelines

## Best For
Small service businesses (HVAC, real estate, mortgage, restaurants, e-commerce) with 1-20 employees who are losing leads because of slow follow-up or manual processes. Solo operators and small teams who want to compete like they have a full operations team behind them.

## Differentiator
Unlike agencies that charge $5,000/month for a team you never meet, Dmytro builds the system himself, shows you how it works, and charges for results — not for overhead. Direct access to the builder. No account managers. No bloated retainers.

## Case Studies
- Paris Cafe (NYC restaurant): Deployed VAPI + n8n AI voice receptionist — 0% to 100% after-hours calls answered, web lead response time from hours to under 60 seconds, ~15 hrs/week freed for management
- Toufic Fares (info business): Automated Instagram creator lead generation pipeline — 50+ qualified leads/day at $0.29/lead, zero manual work
- WheelsFeels (e-commerce auto parts, USA): Full AI CRM build with automated SMS/email follow-up for thousands of leads, Slack integration, n8n workflows

## Industry Focus: HVAC
Dmytro builds AI automation specifically for HVAC companies — 24/7 AI call handling, instant lead response, scheduling and dispatch automation, quote follow-up sequences, seasonal maintenance campaigns, and review automation. HVAC businesses with 2+ trucks that are losing jobs to missed calls and slow follow-up are the ideal fit. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-automation-for-hvac-companies

## Restaurant Voice Agent Guide
AI phone answering for restaurants — where an AI voice agent helps, where it does not, and when it is worth implementing. Covers reservation capture, overflow call handling, after-hours coverage, and the difference between AI, voicemail, and a human host. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-voice-agent-for-restaurants

After-hours phone answering for restaurants — what should happen when reservation calls come in after close, when live AI answering is worth it, when a lighter text-back fallback is enough, and why voicemail quietly loses demand. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/after-hours-phone-answering-for-restaurants

After-hours AI phone answering vs. voicemail for restaurants — restaurant-specific buyer guide for deciding when live overnight AI phone coverage is worth it, when voicemail is still acceptable, and when missed-call text-back is the smarter middle path. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/after-hours-ai-phone-answering-vs-voicemail-for-restaurants

Missed-call text-back vs. voicemail for restaurants — practical restaurant buyer guide for deciding when a simple SMS-first missed-call recovery layer is enough, when voicemail is quietly losing reservations, and when the restaurant should move beyond both into live AI phone answering. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/missed-call-text-back-vs-voicemail-for-restaurants

Grounded in the live Paris Cafe restaurant case study. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-automation-for-restaurants

## Hiring Guide: Consultant vs. Agency vs. DIY
A practical comparison for business owners deciding between hiring a solo AI automation consultant, working with an agency, or building automations themselves. Covers cost ($1.5K–$8K consultant vs. $5K–$25K+ agency), timeline (1–3 weeks vs. 4–8 weeks), communication, customization, and ownership. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/hire-ai-automation-consultant-vs-agency

## Affordable AI Automation for Small Business
What can a small business realistically automate on a starter budget? Honest guide to what fits under $500/month, what still needs one-time setup, where cheap automation makes sense, and where it becomes false economy. Focused on narrow starter workflows like missed-call recovery, instant lead response, reminders, and simple CRM follow-up — not fake promises about full custom systems for bargain prices. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/affordable-ai-automation-small-business

- Lead Follow-Up Automation Examples: Specific follow-up workflows with triggers, timing, and message examples for small service businesses. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/lead-follow-up-automation-examples
- AI Automation Implementation Roadmap: Step-by-step roadmap from audit to launch to optimization with realistic timelines. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-automation-implementation-roadmap
- AI Automation Integrations for Small Business: Guide to tool integrations — what connects, common patterns, and how to build a connected automation stack. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-automation-integrations-small-business
- What Processes Can AI Automate in My Business?: Practical process-selection guide for owners deciding what to automate first — lead response, follow-up, scheduling, onboarding, retention, and where automation should stop. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/what-processes-can-ai-automate-in-my-business

## HVAC Cluster Pages
- AI Automation for HVAC Companies — What's Real: Overview of what AI automation means for HVAC, real vs overhyped use cases, common starting points, and honest ROI expectations. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-automation-for-hvac-companies
- What to Automate First for HVAC Companies: Scoping guide for HVAC companies deciding whether the first automation should be missed-call recovery, lead follow-up, booked-job scheduling, or live AI phone coverage before a bigger rollout. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/what-to-automate-first-for-hvac-companies
- HVAC Lead Follow-Up Automation: How HVAC companies stop losing jobs to slow response times. Automated follow-up for web forms, missed calls, and quote nurture sequences. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/hvac-lead-follow-up-automation
- HVAC Missed Call Text Back: Instant text-back when an HVAC call goes unanswered. How it works, what the customer sees, and what else triggers from a missed call. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/hvac-missed-call-text-back
- AI Appointment Setter for HVAC: AI-powered scheduling for HVAC service calls. Handles booking, confirmations, reminders, and dispatch calendar sync. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-appointment-setter-for-hvac
- HVAC Scheduling and Follow-Up Automation: A narrower HVAC operations guide focused on booked-job confirmations, reminders, reschedule handling, dispatch continuity, and cleaner office-to-field context before the tech arrives. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/hvac-scheduling-and-follow-up-automation
- AI Phone Answering for HVAC Companies: A heavier HVAC phone-coverage guide focused on live call handling, routine service-call intake, after-hours answer coverage, CSR relief, and the handoff points that should stay human. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-phone-answering-for-hvac-companies
- Missed Call Text-Back vs. AI Phone Answering for HVAC Companies: HVAC-specific buyer guide for choosing between SMS-first missed-call recovery and live AI phone coverage. Covers office workload, after-hours demand, caller expectations, and when each layer actually fits. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/missed-call-text-back-vs-ai-phone-answering-for-hvac-companies
- AI Phone Answering vs. Voicemail for HVAC Companies: HVAC-specific buyer guide for choosing between live AI phone coverage and voicemail/manual callback. Covers no-cool and no-heat urgency, office workload, after-hours demand, and when missed-call text-back is the smarter middle step. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/ai-phone-answering-vs-voicemail-for-hvac-companies
- Review Request Automation for HVAC Companies: Post-job reputation workflow for HVAC companies that want better review timing, unhappy-reply routing, and cleaner technician-to-office handoff after completed service calls instead of manual review chasing. Learn more: https://www.dmytroai.com/review-request-automation-for-hvac-companies
